Yoga and Writing Workshop in Basel, SwitzerlandStep into a journey woven with the essence of the four elements, in harmony and awkward grace with the natural rhythm of the seasons.From spring’s energy of growth, to summer’s fire of transformation, autumn’s call to release, and winter’s deep stillness, each workshop offers a space to ground, move, and express in a safe space and in community. Rooted in embodied yoga and reflective writing, this is an invitation to return to your center, let your thoughts flow onto paper, and reconnect with your creative voice, season by season.Seasonal cycle 2025:Spring: Wood, Growth, 23.03.25Summer: Fire, Transformation, 22.06.25Autumn: Metal, Letting Go, 14.09.25Winter: Water, Stillness, 21.12.25Time: - 14:00The most beautiful ideas grow from deep roots, ignited by your inner fire, shaped by the wisdom to let go, and nurtured in the stillness of rest.Root into your body.Soften into stillness.Let the words find you.This is a space to build the foundation for what wants to emerge.Through embodied movement and conscious writing, you’ll tune into the rhythm beneath the noise, where movement becomes meditation, and your pen becomes a pathway.Creative flow begins in the body.Your story starts here.We use various yoga methods and creative writing practices, because putting words on paper and anchoring them in the body creates a world where anything is possible.The aim is to be curious and playful with language and movement. We will explore new perspectives and tune into desire, intuition, and imagination.An open and receptive body supports this process. We'll practice grounding and harmonizing yoga sequences in between writing explorations.Energy begins to flow and existing blockages in the body or mind are dissolved. Insights, reflections and ideas pour out onto the page with ease.Embodied yoga, meditation, and creative writing come together to guide you into a state of flow and deep self-expression.Perfect for:Yogis, writers, creatives, and anyone looking to reconnect with their inner voice.No prior yoga or writing experience needed, just curiosity.This is for you if you’re searching for:Yoga and writing retreat Switzerlandcreative writing workshop Baselembodied yoga for creativitywriting in flow mind-body connection workshopCost per workshop(you can attend singular ones, includes follow up materials)Low income: CHF 110.–General price: CHF 130.–Supporter: CHF 150.–Or, book our complete package, all four workshops, and you are guaranteed a place:All four workshops (complete package): CHF 468.–(Includes guaranteed spot + follow-up materials)Bring a friend or sibling and receive 10% off your workshop fee.Payment: we ask you to please prepay via Twint or bank transfer or cash onsight.What to bring:A curious spirit and a willingness to exploreA notebook & your favorite penComfortable clothes & warm socks (optional)What we provide:water and tea, snacks & a cozy atmosphereA take-home piece of our seasonal mandalaAfter each workshop: a guided meditation and two writing prompts via email to deepen your vision at homeWorkshops will be held in German, with live English translation available, please let us know in advance.Location:Raum für Mehr, Schlüsselberg 10, Basel, SwitzerlandRegister via email:rin@rin.yogasandra@engelbrecht.liLimited to 10 participants, register early to save your spot.Register via text message or call:Rinny+41 76 589 98 29Our workshops are open to all. We offer a sliding scale and are happy to find a solution if cost is a barrier. Just reach out.
